question:
Will Player D win the 2025 DP World India Championship?

Description: This market will resolve according to the player who wins the 2025 DP World India Championship, an official DP World Tour event scheduled to take place at the Delhi Golf Club, New Delhi, India, from October 16–19, 2025.

If a listed player withdraws, is disqualified, or otherwise becomes ineligible to win under the official tournament rules, that player’s market will resolve to “No.”

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by DP World Tour tournament rules (e.g., playoff results).

If no winner is officially announced by December 31, 2025, this market will resolve to “Other.”

The primary resolution sources will be the official results published by the DP World Tour on europeantour.com, and confirmation through PGA TOUR results or other credible media reporting may also be used.
event_title:
Will Player D win the 2025 DP World India Championship?

Description: This market will resolve according to the player who wins the 2025 DP World India Championship, an official DP World Tour event scheduled to take place at the Delhi Golf Club, New Delhi, India, from October 16–19, 2025.

If a listed player withdraws, is disqualified, or otherwise becomes ineligible to win under the official tournament rules, that player’s market will resolve to “No.”

In the event of a tie, this market will resolve according to the official winner as determined by DP World Tour tournament rules (e.g., playoff results).

If no winner is officially announced by December 31, 2025, this market will resolve to “Other.”

The primary resolution sources will be the official results published by the DP World Tour on europeantour.com, and confirmation through PGA TOUR results or other credible media reporting may also be used.

evidences.title: DP World India Championship 2025 preview picks analysis
evidences.content: ### The Course: Delhi Golf Club was established in the 1930s and was redesigned by Peter Thomson in 1977. It is heavily tree-lined. It is a par 72 measuring 6,912 yards and puts a premium on accuracy from the tee. ### Form Guide: Would you bet against Rory McIlroy adding yet another title to his glittering collection? He will be refreshed after a break following his efforts at the Ryder Cup and is not here to make up the numbers. ### Prize Money: Total prize money is $4m, with 5,000 Race to Dubai points awarded to the winner. ### How to Watch: Thursday, October 16, Sky Sports Golf, 7.30am; Friday, October 17, Sky Sports Golf, 7.30am; Saturday, October 18, Sky Sports Golf, 8am; Sunday, October 19, Sky Sports Golf, 7am. ### To Win: Rory McIlroy. evidences.title: DP World India Championship betting preview
evidences.content: As such, picking a winner is slightly more difficult with no course form to go on. Despite this, McIlroy and Fleetwood offer next to no value at odds of 4/1 and 6/1, respectively. Looking further down the betting market is the way to go this week, and we at Odds Now examine three selections that could go well in the Indian capital this week. ## DP World India Championship 2025 betting tips ### Selection #1 – John Parry – 28/1 (Skybet 1/5 odds 6 places) As mentioned, many of the field haven’t played the course, but John Parry has. He secured a top-20 finish at the 2015 Indian Open. [...] ### Selection #2 – Thriston Lawrence – 50/1 (Ladbrokes/ Coral, 1/5 odds 7 places) Earlier this year, Lawrence finished fourth at the Soudal Open, showing correlating course form which could stand him in good stead at Delhi Golf Club this week. The South African won on tour as recently as August at the Omega European Masters, but failed to crack the top 20 in his four starts since then. There were signs of improvement in Spain last week. Lawrence ranked first in Strokes Gained Approach (+2.53) out of the entire field. If this sort of ball striking is on display across all four days in India, he co...

evidences.title: 2025 DP World India Championship betting tips and preview
evidences.content: It’s not a new course for DP World Tour regulars, though. Delhi Golf Club has hosted the Indian Open no fewer than 30 times since that tournament’s founding in 1964 – though it hasn’t been back to the country’s capital since 2016. So who am I backing for glory in this brand new event? We’ll get there, but first… ### 2025 DP World India Championship key details Dates: October 16-19 Venue: Delhi Golf Club, Delhi, India (Par 72 – 6,912 yards) Format: 72-hole strokeplay with 36-hole cut Purse:$4 million Race2Dubai Ranking Points: 5,000 Defending champion: N/A (inaugural event) ### How to watch the DP World India Championship US viewers can catch all the action on the Golf Channel. All times EDT [...] 20/1 e/w (Paddy Power, Sky Bet 6 Places 1/5) Rory McIlroy, Tommy Fleetwood, Ben Griffin, and Viktor Hovland are all in this field and are all seen as more likely winners than Brian Harman, for good reason. The thing for me is that Harman is double the price of Hovland who is the outsider of that group, and he looks a reasonable course fit to me. On top of that, Harman’s iron play is trending in the right direction and should he couple a good ball striking week with what is typically a r...

evidences.title: DP World India Championship Tips 2025 - Golf Betting System
evidences.content: Delhi Golf Club. Designer: HS Wilkinson, 1951 with Peter Thompson re-design, 1977 & Gary Player renovation, 2019; Course Type: Classical, Technical; Par: 72; Length: 6,912 yards; Water Hazards: None in play; Fairways: Bermuda; Rough: Bermuda; Greens: Ultra-Dwarf Bermuda. Course Overview. The Delhi Golf Club is the oldest and most prestigious club in New Delhi with a membership waiting list reportedly in excess of 30 years. Originally routed in the early 1950s by H.S. “Bunny” Wilkinson and later reshaped by five-time Open Champion Peter Thomson in 1977, the layout was given a modernisation by Gary Player Design in 2019. The renovation refined green complexes, added new bunkering, and sharpened the strategic angles that define this classical, technical test. [...] Course Form: Looking at the same 10 winners here since 2015 all had played the course at least once before, and in the case of some of the home-grown players on many occasions. SSP Chawrasia has won here 3 times and Anirban Lahiri 4 times, with the most recent winner Ajeetesh Sandhu also boasting a strong record on this course: A short, quirky course where driver is seldom used may not appeal to some of the more modern g...

evidences.title: Draftkings Best DP World India Championship Picks 10/15/25
evidences.content: The DP World India Championship will be played at the Delhi Golf Club in New Delhi, India. The golf course is a par 72 that measures approximately 6,912 yards. ## Will the DP World India Championship have a traditional cut? The 2025 DP World Tour Championship will have a field of 156 players to start the tournament on Wednesday. Upon the completion of two rounds of competitive play a cut will occur. The top 65 and ties will move on to round three. The remaining golfers will miss the cut. ## DP World India Championship Key Player Statistics I wanted to emphasize that the purpose of this article is not to provide an exact DFS lineup. [...] Rory McIlroy is currently ranked third in strokes gained off the tee (0.671), eighth in strokes gained putting (0.597), second in driving distance (323.1), 14th in scrambling (63.80%), eighth in birdie or better percentage (35.65%), third in total strokes gained (1.543) and seventh in par five scoring average (4.48) on the PGA Tour. What did we learn from the data just presented? Clearly, Rory McIlroy is playing at a high level entering this week’s DP World Tour event. With that said, I fully expect that trend to continue at the Delhi Golf Club...

evidences.content: Venue: DELHI Prize Money: USD 4 MILLION ## Description The DP World India Championship 2025, set for 16–19 October at Delhi Golf Club, is the biggest golf event ever staged in India with a record USD 4 million prize pool. As the eighth stop in the DP World Tour’s ‘Back 9’ Race to Dubai, it will see global stars Rory McIlroy, Tommy Fleetwood, Viktor Hovland, and Shane Lowry tee off alongside India’s own Yuvraj Sandhu and Udayan Mane. Co-sanctioned by the DP World Tour and PGTI, this 72-hole championship marks a landmark moment for Indian golf, leading up to the season-ending DP World Tour Championship in Dubai. ##### 01 Share; "Share") image ### Sheikh 9 months How to participate Are you sure you want to delete this comment? evidences.title: Indian Open (golf) - Wikipedia
evidences.content: The Indian Open, titled for sponsorship reasons as the Hero Indian Open since 2011, is the national open golf championship of India, organised by the Indian Golf Union. Founded in 1964, it was added to the Asia Golf Circuit schedule in 1970. In 1998 it became an event on the rival Omega Tour (known as the Asian Tour since 2004). Since 2015, it has also been co-sanctioned by the European Tour. From 1964 until 2000, the tournament was held exclusively at either Delhi Golf Club or Royal Calcutta Golf Club. Since then it has been held at Classic Golf Resort") in 2000 and 2001, Karnataka Golf Association") in 2012, and DLF Golf and Country Club in 2009 and since 2017; all other editions have been held at Delhi Golf Club. ## History [edit&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")] [...] | Year | Tour(s) | Winner | Score | To par | Margin of victory | Runner(s)-up | Venue | Ref. | --- --- --- --- | Hero Indian Open | | 2026 | EUR, PGTI | England Alex Fitzpatrick | 279 | −9 | 2 strokes | Spain Eugenio Chacarra | DLF | | 2025 | EUR, PGTI | Spain Eugenio Chacarra | 284 | −4 | 2 strokes | Japan Keita Nakajima | DLF | | | 2024 | EUR, PGTI | Japan Keita Nakajima | 271 | −17 | 4 strokes...

evidences.title: DP World India Championship 2025 - golf - BookMyShow
evidences.content: With a US$4 million prize fund and a pivotal place in the ‘Back 9’ swing of the Race to Dubai, the tournament is set to draw a world-class field, headlined by five-time Major winner and recently crowned Masters Champion Rory McIlroy, alongside Ryder Cup star Tommy Fleetwood, with both players making their debuts in India. Fans can expect four days of thrilling play in the heart of Delhi, with the stakes building toward the season-ending DP World Tour Play-Offs. Co-sanctioned with the Professional Golf Tour of India and backed by DP World’s global commitment to growing the game, the championship is poised to become India’s marquee international golf event, bringing together elite competition, vibrant local energy, and a powerful platform to inspire and expand the future of golf in India.
